candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.

args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.teignummer) matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.teignummer, matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.areal, kommuner.kommunenavn, fylker.fylkesnavn FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig JOIN kommuner ON ST_Intersects(matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.geometri, kommuner.geometri) JOIN fylker ON ST_Intersects(matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.geometri, fylker.geometri) WHERE kommuner.kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim' AND matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.areal > 5000 ORDER BY matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.teignummer, matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.areal DESC LIMIT 10
